data.title: Crossroads Treatment Centers Launches Mobile Addiction Treatment in Rural Western North Carolina with Local Church and Vaya Health
data.description: In Weaverville, North Carolina on April 9, 2026, local religious leaders revealed their choice to collaborate with Crossroads stemmed from a mutual goal to aid in the restoration of lives. Following a prolonged search spanning over nine months for a suitable community ally to host a mobile unit for addiction treatment, Crossroads found support among faith leaders.

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies increases buyback to $4B and uplisted on NYSE as Ethereum firm expands.
data.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies, a major Ethereum treasury entity, increased its share repurchase initiative to an impressive $4 billion and successfully completed its uplisting process to the New York Stock Exchange on Thursday.

data.title: Ilkka Oyj: Acquisition of own shares on 9 April 2026
data.description: Ilkka Oyj announced on 9 April 2026 that they had acquired their own shares on that day. The Stock Exchange release was disclosed at 07:00 p.m. EEST. Further details on the number of shares and the acquisition amount were not provided in the release.

data.title: Rexel: Statement relating to the total number of shares and voting rights as of March 31, 2026
data.description: Rexel has issued a statement regarding the total number of shares and voting rights in accordance with Article L.233-8 II of the French Commercial Code and Article 223-16 of the General Rules of the French Autorité des marchés financiers. This statement discloses important figures related to the company's shares and voting rights as per regulatory requirements.

data.title: Five Star Bank announces commitment to a $10 million Low Income Housing Tax Credit Investment in the Marvel in the Mission, providing 136-units of permanent supportive housing to San Francisco residents
data.description: The community bank has made its inaugural investment in Low-Income Housing Tax Credits (LIHTC) in the Bay Area, aiding in San Francisco's housing recovery and revitalization initiatives. This investment marks the bank's entry into supporting affordable housing in the region, contributing to the continued efforts to address the housing needs in San Francisco.

Merz: 'There is a chance for peace in the Middle East. Germany has a fundamental interest in this: The stability of the region, as well as the development of the global economy and our own, depends on it. We are ready to take responsibility and secure peace.'

data.title: Mortgage Rates Inch Down
data.description: Today, Freddie Mac unveiled the findings of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ), revealing that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) reached an average of 6.37%. This data was released on April 9, 2026, and comes from Freddie Mac (OTCQB: FMCC).

data.title: Erratum: Correction of press release published on April 7th, 2026
data.description: On April 7th, a press release regarding the purchase of company shares was found to have inaccuracies.

data.title: Availability of Transgene’s  2025 Universal Registration Document (URD)
data.description: Transgene, a biotech company listed on Euronext Paris as TNG, specializing in creating virus-based immunotherapies for cancer treatment, has disclosed that the French edition of its 2025 Universal Registration Document has been submitted to the French Financial Markets Authority (AMF) on April 9, 2026, with the reference number D.26-0241.

data.title: Bain Capital and Evergreen Medical Properties Acquire Portfolio of Six Medical Outpatient Facilities in Atlanta Metropolitan Area
data.description: Bain Capital's Real Estate arm and Evergreen Medical Properties have disclosed their joint acquisition of a portfolio of medical outpatient buildings in Atlanta, amassing around 665,000 square feet in total. The purchase, conducted off-market, includes six assets in the Atlanta metro area. This strategic partnership emphasizes the acquisition, refurbishment, and management of essential medical outpatient facilities.
Pakistan's representative at the Security Council: 'I do not know why confusion arose regarding the inclusion of Lebanon in the agreement, as it was clearly part of the statement.'

data.title: BayCare Named a 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplace for Third Straight Year
data.description: In Clearwater, Florida on April 9, 2026, BayCare proudly received the 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award for the third consecutive year. This accolade is bestowed upon organizations with 150 or more employees that have demonstrated exceptional workplace environments.

data.title: INUIKII Successfully Implements Centric PLM On Scope, On Time and On Budget
data.description: A renowned Swiss luxury footwear brand has decided to consolidate its product information using Centric Software in order to enhance team and supplier collaboration as well as promote transparency. Following this decision, INUIKII has successfully implemented Centric PLM. This move aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency within the company.
NATO's Rutte: NATO will be willing to play a role in a possible Strait of Hormuz mission if it is able to.

data.title: Florida Plastic Surgery & Med Spa Earns Top Honors in 2026 Sarasota Herald-Tribune Community Choice Awards
data.description: In Sarasota, Florida, on April 9, 2026, Florida Plastic Surgery & Med Spa announced its success in the Sarasota Herald-Tribune Community Choice Awards, securing numerous first-place honors for the year 2026. The practice has been acknowledged for its excellence, underlining the community's trust in their services.

data.title: Cobalt Appoints Cybersecurity Pioneer Tony Spinelli to Board of Directors
data.description: In San Francisco, Cobalt unveiled that Tony Spinelli has joined its board of directors. Boasting a remarkable track record, Spinelli has served as a CISO four times and CIO twice. With over 25 years in driving digital evolution and enhancing security for intricate corporate setups, his wealth of knowledge is an invaluable addition to Cobalt. The company, distinguished for pioneering penetration testing as a service (PTaaS) and offering cutting-edge AI-infused offensive security solutions, stands to benefit significantly from Spinelli's expertise.
